panels.description: RPC service liveness check (/live endpoint). Returns UP if the process is running. Does not check dependencies.
panels.title: RPC Live

panels.description: RPC service readiness check (/ready endpoint). Checks: Nethermind sync status, PostgreSQL connection, Pathfinder availability, Indexer lag.
panels.title: RPC Ready

panels.description: Pathfinder service liveness check (/live endpoint). Returns UP if the process is running.
panels.title: Pathfinder Live

panels.description: Pathfinder service readiness check (/ready endpoint). Checks: trust graphs loaded in memory, background refresh service healthy.
panels.title: Pathfinder Ready

panels.description: Cache service liveness check (/live endpoint). Returns UP if the process is running.
panels.title: Cache Live

panels.description: Cache service readiness check (/ready endpoint). Checks: warmup replay complete, pg_notify connection established, cache lag within threshold.
panels.title: Cache Ready

panels.description: Invitations service liveness check (/health/live endpoint). Returns UP if the process is running.
panels.title: Invitations Live

panels.description: Invitations service readiness check (/health/ready endpoint). Checks database connectivity.
panels.title: Invitations Ready

panels.description: Auth service liveness check (/health/live endpoint). Returns UP if the process is running.
panels.title: Auth Live

panels.description: Auth service readiness check (/health/ready endpoint). Checks database connectivity.
panels.title: Auth Ready

panels.description: Nethermind execution client health check (/health endpoint). Checks node sync status and JSON-RPC availability.
panels.title: Nethermind

panels.description: Lighthouse consensus client health check (/eth/v1/node/health). Returns 200 when synced, 206 when syncing - both are considered healthy.
panels.title: Consensus (Lighthouse)

panels.description: Caddy reverse proxy health check (internal port 80). Routes traffic to RPC, Pathfinder, Profiles, and Chain-RPC services.
panels.title: Caddy (Proxy)

panels.description: Nethermind uptime percentage over last 24 hours. Formula: avg(probe_success) × 100. Green ≥99%, Yellow ≥95%, Red <95%.
panels.title: Nethermind Uptime (24h)

panels.description: Lighthouse consensus client uptime percentage over last 24 hours. Green ≥99%, Yellow ≥95%, Red <95%.
panels.title: Consensus Uptime (24h)

panels.description: Caddy reverse proxy uptime percentage over last 24 hours. Green ≥99%, Yellow ≥95%, Red <95%.
panels.title: Caddy Uptime (24h)

panels.description: Current number of peers connected to the Nethermind execution client. Red <3, Yellow 3-9, Green ≥10.
panels.title: Nethermind Peers

panels.description: Current number of peers connected to the Lighthouse consensus client. Red <10, Yellow 10-29, Green ≥30.
panels.title: Consensus (Lighthouse) Peers

panels.description: Peer count over time for both execution and consensus clients. Low peer counts may indicate network issues.
panels.title: Peer Count Over Time

panels.description: IPFS Gateway (Filebase) health check. Fetches a known Circles profile CID and validates the response contains profile data.
panels.title: IPFS Gateway (Filebase)

panels.description: IPFS Gateway response time. Shows how long it takes to fetch a profile from the Filebase gateway.
panels.title: IPFS Gateway Latency

panels.description: IPFS Gateway uptime percentage over last 24 hours. Green ≥99%, Yellow ≥95%, Red <95%.
panels.title: IPFS Uptime (24h)

panels.description: IPFS Gateway latency over time. Tracks response time trends for profile fetching.
panels.title: IPFS Latency Trend

panels.description: Combined service uptime over 7 days. Uses pre-computed recording rule for efficiency.
panels.title: Nethermind (7d)

panels.description: Consensus client uptime over 7 days.
panels.title: Consensus (7d)

panels.description: Caddy reverse proxy uptime over 7 days.
panels.title: Caddy (7d)

panels.description: Nethermind uptime over 30 days. Uses pre-computed recording rule.
panels.title: Nethermind (30d)

panels.description: Consensus client uptime over 30 days.
panels.title: Consensus (30d)

panels.description: Caddy reverse proxy uptime over 30 days.
panels.title: Caddy (30d)

panels.description: Readiness probe results over time (0=not ready, 1=ready). Readiness indicates service can handle traffic - dependencies are healthy.
panels.title: Service Readiness Over Time

panels.description: Liveness probe results over time (0=down, 1=up). Liveness checks process health only - does not verify dependencies.
panels.title: Service Liveness Over Time

panels.description: Time taken for /ready endpoint to respond. Includes dependency checks (DB, Nethermind, etc). High times may indicate slow dependencies.
panels.title: Health Check Response Time (Ready)

panels.description: Time taken for /live endpoint to respond. Should be very fast (<100ms) as it only checks process health, not dependencies.
panels.title: Health Check Response Time (Live)

panels.description: RPC service availability over 24 hours based on /ready checks. Formula: successful_probes / total_probes × 100.
panels.title: RPC Uptime (24h)

panels.description: Pathfinder service availability over 24 hours based on /ready checks. Formula: successful_probes / total_probes × 100.
panels.title: Pathfinder Uptime (24h)

panels.description: Cache service availability over 24 hours based on /ready checks. Formula: successful_probes / total_probes × 100.
panels.title: Cache Uptime (24h)

panels.description: Mean Time To Recovery (MTTR) for services over the last 24 hours. Lower is better. This estimates average time from service down to service up.
panels.title: RPC MTTR (24h)

panels.description: Mean Time To Recovery for Pathfinder service over 24 hours.
panels.title: Pathfinder MTTR (24h)

panels.description: Downtime per service in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: Downtime by Service (24h)

panels.description: Number of incidents (service state changes from up→down) in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: Incidents (24h)

panels.description: MTTR trend over 7 days by service. Shows average recovery time per incident.
panels.title: MTTR Trend (7d)

panels.description: Downtime per service over 7 days. Total seconds each service was unavailable.
panels.title: Downtime by Service (7d)

panels.description: Real-time status of RPC method functional probes. These make actual JSON-RPC calls and validate response content, not just HTTP status.
panels.title: RPC Method Status

panels.description: Response time for each RPC functional probe. High values may indicate database or service issues.
panels.title: RPC Method Response Time

panels.description: Success rate of RPC functional probes over 24 hours. Should be 100% for healthy operation.
panels.title: RPC Method Success Rate (24h)

panels.description: External HTTPS probe for main RPC endpoint (staging.circlesubi.network). Tests public accessibility through Caddy reverse proxy.
panels.title: RPC Endpoint

panels.description: External HTTPS probe for Pathfinder endpoint (staging.circlesubi.network/pathfinder). Tests public path calculation API accessibility.
panels.title: Pathfinder Endpoint

panels.description: Days until SSL certificate expires. Formula: (cert_expiry_timestamp - now) / 86400. Red <7d, Orange <14d, Yellow <30d, Green ≥30d.
panels.title: SSL Certificate Expiry

panels.description: Average time to complete external HTTPS probe including TLS handshake. High values may indicate network or TLS issues.
panels.title: External Response Time

panels.description: Response time for all external HTTPS endpoints over time. Includes TLS handshake. Compare across services to identify bottlenecks.
panels.title: External Endpoint Response Time

panels.description: External endpoint availability over time (0=down, 1=up). Shows public-facing service health as seen from outside the network.
panels.title: External Endpoint Availability

panels.description: Current HTTP request rate through Caddy reverse proxy. Formula: sum(rate(requests[5m])). Shows overall traffic load.
panels.title: Request Rate

panels.description: Total HTTP requests served by Caddy in the last 24 hours. Formula: sum(increase(requests[24h])).
panels.title: Requests (24h)

panels.description: Total HTTP requests served by Caddy in the last 7 days. Uses pre-computed recording rule.
panels.title: Requests (7d)

panels.description: Total HTTP requests served by Caddy in the last 30 days. Uses pre-computed recording rule.
panels.title: Requests (30d)

panels.description: Percentage of requests resulting in errors. Formula: rate(errors) / rate(all) × 100. Green <1%, Yellow <5%, Red ≥5%.
panels.title: Error Rate

panels.description: 95th percentile request latency through Caddy. Formula: histogram_quantile(0.95, request_duration). 95% of requests complete faster than this.
panels.title: P95 Latency

panels.description: Traffic distribution by route prefix over the last 24 hours. Extracted from Caddy access logs. Routes: / (RPC), /grafana, /pathfinder, /profiles, /chain-rpc, /referrals, /auth, /test-env. Empty route indicates root RPC requests.
panels.title: Requests by Route (24h)

panels.description: Traffic distribution by route prefix over the last 7 days.
panels.title: Requests by Route (7d)

panels.description: Traffic distribution by route prefix over the last 14 days.
panels.title: Requests by Route (14d)

panels.description: Request and error rates over time. Total requests and errors handled by Caddy reverse proxy.
panels.title: Request & Error Rate

panels.description: Request latency percentiles over time. P50=median, P90=90% of requests, P99=slowest 1%. Watch for P99 spikes indicating tail latency issues.
panels.title: Request Latency Percentiles

panels.description: Active database connections by service. Uses pg_stat_activity.application_name to identify workload source. Core services: nethermind-indexer, rpc-host, pathfinder, cache-service. Observability: metrics-exporter, postgres-exporter.
panels.title: DB Connections by Service

panels.description: Total active PostgreSQL connections and max limit. Green <80, Yellow <95, Red ≥95 (default max=100).
panels.title: Total DB Connections

panels.description: Longest running query duration. High values may indicate slow queries or locks.
panels.title: Longest Query

panels.description: Database operations rate by type. Shows INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/SELECT rates over time.
panels.title: DB Operations Rate

panels.description: Current connections breakdown by service. Shows which services are consuming database connections right now.
panels.title: Connection Distribution

panels.description: Database deadlocks in the last hour. Any deadlock indicates lock contention issues that need investigation.
panels.title: Deadlocks (1h)

panels.description: PostgreSQL uptime status. 1=up, 0=down.
panels.title: PostgreSQL Status
